question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Pointe De La Hague will be higher on each resolution date listed below than on 2026-03-01?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.07020.D once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-03-01 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2026-02-19) was 9.550. (The daily average temperature at the French weather station at Pointe De La Hague.)
background: The history of Average temperature by day and by station for France - Degree Celsius - PTE DE LA HAGUE - Daily from Météo-France is available at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.07020.D.
